display-name.lang: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Citizen Smith
programme.desc: Wolfie is on the lookout for any money-making opportunity he can find. When Ken's attention is firmly taken up by pavement art, Citizen Smith may have found his answer.

programme.title: Citizen Smith
programme.desc: Speed is due out of prison after an 18-month sentence, and Wolfie's not looking forward to informing him that his long-term girlfriend is pregnant.

programme.title: Citizen Smith
programme.desc: Ken falls in love with the girlfriend of one of Wolfie's prison-bound friends and arranges to take her away for the weekend, but Wolfie tags along to keep an eye on things.

programme.title: Citizen Smith
programme.desc: Following a by-election humiliation in which he gained a mere 6 votes, Wolfie plans to kidnap the Conservative who beat him. There's nothing as bad as democracy.

programme.title: Citizen Smith
programme.desc: When a customer starts chatting up Shirley in the shop, she decides to move on from Wolfie - which means the fearless leader may have to move out of her spare room.

programme.title: Citizen Smith
programme.desc: Wolfie is on the lookout for any money-making opportunity he can find. When Ken's attention is firmly taken up by pavement art, Citizen Smith may have found his answer.

programme.title: Citizen Smith
programme.desc: Speed is due out of prison after an 18-month sentence, and Wolfie's not looking forward to informing him that his long-term girlfriend is pregnant.

programme.title: Citizen Smith
programme.desc: Ken falls in love with the girlfriend of one of Wolfie's prison-bound friends and arranges to take her away for the weekend, but Wolfie tags along to keep an eye on things.

programme.title: Citizen Smith
programme.desc: Following a by-election humiliation in which he gained a mere 6 votes, Wolfie plans to kidnap the Conservative who beat him. There's nothing as bad as democracy.

programme.title: Citizen Smith
programme.desc: When a customer starts chatting up Shirley in the shop, she decides to move on from Wolfie - which means the fearless leader may have to move out of her spare room.

programme.title: Citizen Smith
programme.desc: Wolfie is on the lookout for any money-making opportunity he can find. When Ken's attention is firmly taken up by pavement art, Citizen Smith may have found his answer.

programme.title: Citizen Smith
programme.desc: Speed is due out of prison after an 18-month sentence, and Wolfie's not looking forward to informing him that his long-term girlfriend is pregnant.

programme.title: Villages By The Sea
programme.desc: Archaeologist Ben Robinson visits the Yorkshire coastal village of Flamborough and discovers its historic chalk buildings.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Mexico: Earth's Festival of Life
programme.desc: The forests of the Yucatan Peninsula, which contain the ruins of the Mayan civilisation and a wide range of wildlife, including jaguars, monkeys and tropical birds.

programme.title: Mexico: Earth's Festival of Life
programme.desc: The deserts of Mexico's northern region, home to animals such as prairie dogs, pygmy owls and aplomado falcons that have adapted to thrive in these arid conditions.

programme.title: Wild Brazil
programme.desc: A trip to South America to meet three animal families - capuchin monkeys, giant otters and coatis - who are trying to raise their young in a tough environment.

programme.title: Wild Brazil
programme.desc: Witness dramatic footage from the animal kingdom as the capuchin monkey, giant otter and coati families are put to the test by Brazil's monsoon rains and floods.

programme.title: Mexico: Earth's Festival of Life
programme.desc: The forests of the Yucatan Peninsula, which contain the ruins of the Mayan civilisation and a wide range of wildlife, including jaguars, monkeys and tropical birds.

programme.title: Mexico: Earth's Festival of Life
programme.desc: The deserts of Mexico's northern region, home to animals such as prairie dogs, pygmy owls and aplomado falcons that have adapted to thrive in these arid conditions.

programme.title: Wild Brazil
programme.desc: A trip to South America to meet three animal families - capuchin monkeys, giant otters and coatis - who are trying to raise their young in a tough environment.

programme.title: Wild Brazil
programme.desc: Witness dramatic footage from the animal kingdom as the capuchin monkey, giant otter and coati families are put to the test by Brazil's monsoon rains and floods.

programme.title: Mexico: Earth's Festival of Life
programme.desc: The forests of the Yucatan Peninsula, which contain the ruins of the Mayan civilisation and a wide range of wildlife, including jaguars, monkeys and tropical birds.

programme.title: Mexico: Earth's Festival of Life
programme.desc: The deserts of Mexico's northern region, home to animals such as prairie dogs, pygmy owls and aplomado falcons that have adapted to thrive in these arid conditions.

programme.title: Wild Brazil
programme.desc: A trip to South America to meet three animal families - capuchin monkeys, giant otters and coatis - who are trying to raise their young in a tough environment.

programme.title: Wild Brazil
programme.desc: Witness dramatic footage from the animal kingdom as the capuchin monkey, giant otter and coati families are put to the test by Brazil's monsoon rains and floods.

programme.title: Mexico: Earth's Festival of Life
programme.desc: The forests of the Yucatan Peninsula, which contain the ruins of the Mayan civilisation and a wide range of wildlife, including jaguars, monkeys and tropical birds.

programme.title: Mexico: Earth's Festival of Life
programme.desc: The deserts of Mexico's northern region, home to animals such as prairie dogs, pygmy owls and aplomado falcons that have adapted to thrive in these arid conditions.

programme.title: Wild Brazil
programme.desc: A trip to South America to meet three animal families - capuchin monkeys, giant otters and coatis - who are trying to raise their young in a tough environment.

programme.title: Wild Brazil
programme.desc: Witness dramatic footage from the animal kingdom as the capuchin monkey, giant otter and coati families are put to the test by Brazil's monsoon rains and floods.

programme.title: The Voice U.S.A
programme.desc: The remaining artists compete to make it to the live finale; tough decisions are made when coaches Niall Horan and Snoop Dogg can only advance one artist each.

programme.title: Home And Away
programme.desc: Harper struggles with Archie's absence. Eden gives Lacey some perspective. Has Abigail moved on?

programme.title: Home Economics
programme.desc: Sarah throws an elaborate fundraiser to impress her boss. S2 E15

programme.title: Pitch Perfect 3
programme.desc: After winning the World Championships, the Bellas reunite for an overseas tour where they will make music and some questionable decisions, one last time. Starring Anna Kendrick. (2017)

programme.title: The Dark Crystal
programme.desc: On another planet in the distant past, the last of the Gelfling race embarks on a quest to find the missing shard of a magical crystal and to restore order to his world. Starring Jim Henson. (1982)

programme.title: Celebrity Tipping Point NZ
programme.desc: Former All White Rory Fallon, All Whites defender Francis de Vries, and goalkeeper Oli Sail switch their boots for buzzers in the hopes of winning for their charity.

programme.title: Booze Patrol
programme.desc: It’s been a long beery afternoon for thirty-four-year-old Adam who really can’t say how many he’s had... but is sure he will be over the limit. S1 E5

programme.title: Masterchef Australia
programme.desc: It's the start of Around the World Week, and global food icon Rick Stein joins the MasterChef Kitchen to set an extra spicy Mystery Box challenge. S18 E16

programme.title: Joker
programme.desc: Arthur Fleck, a mentally ill and struggling comedian, is outcast in Gotham City. As his life unravels, he transforms into the violent figure known as the Joker. Starring Joaquin Phoenix. (2019)

programme.title: Doc
programme.desc: While navigating the fallout from Katie's secret, Amy treats a critically ill patient with a dark one of her own. S2 E15

programme.title: Pam & Tommy
programme.desc: Pamela Anderson and Tommy Lee meet, get high, and get married, all in four days. They move into Tommy's home in Southern California. S1 E2

programme.title: The Tourist
programme.desc: Elliot seeks help from an unlikely ally in order to secure his escape from the island. Meanwhile, Helen gets acquainted with some threatening figures as she continues to track Elliot down. S2 E2

programme.title: Handsome Devil: Charming Killer
programme.desc: Series Premiere: After Wade Wilson leaves his date at a bar, a dead body is found, and a hunt for a killer begins. S1 E1

programme.title: The Nanny
programme.desc: Niles quits in a huff when he learns that Fran makes more money than he does. Meanwhile, Fran and CC ask Dr Joyce Brothers to choose who is better for Maxwell. S5 E5

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: LES MILLS Born To Move
programme.desc: Designed to nurture a life-long love of physical activity, BORN TO MOVE helps children experience the joy and vitality of moving to music, combining fun and fitness in way that children love.

programme.title: Kiri and Lou
programme.desc: Kiri and Lou follows the adventures of Kiri, a feisty little dinosaur with overpowering emotions and Lou, a gentle but thoughtful creature.

programme.title: Toi Time
programme.desc: Toi Time is back for Season 4 with more laughter and learning. Join Aunty Anika, Māia, Jojo, Riki, and Buzz as they explore the world around them.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Join these beloved blue characters as they go on all new adventures that will push the charm, absurdity, and humour of the original series to even greater heights!

programme.title: Scooby Doo And Guess Who?
programme.desc: The Mystery Inc. gage solve mysteries alongside a new celebrity guest star each episode.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.desc: Robin, Cyborg, Starfire, Raven and Beast Boy are superheroes and roommates who love to save the day. But what happens when they're not fighting crime?

programme.title: Darwin & Newts
programme.desc: Darwin & Newts are a brother/sister duo who love adventures and figuring out how stuff works! Join them as they explore and discover new things, with the help of science and some Kiwi ingenuity.

programme.title: Tākaro Tribe
programme.desc: Come join the Tākaro Tribe! They sing and dance their way through their magical alphabet forest, meeting friends and whānau and learning as they go.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Les Mills Adult Classes
programme.desc: Les Mills and TVNZ are thrilled to be working together to offer you free access to renowned Les Mills classes; BODYBALANCE, BODYCOMBAT, BODYATTACK, LES MILLS CORE and LES MILLS GRIT Cardio.

programme.title: Masterchef Australia
programme.desc: It's the start of Around the World Week, and global food icon Rick Stein joins the MasterChef Kitchen to set an extra spicy Mystery Box challenge. S18 E16

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Driven by humour and optimism, Drew Barrymore presents human interest stories and has heartfelt conversations with special guests.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Mark Williams stars as the crime-solving priest, who this time sets out to protect an old friend by investigating a 300-year-old secret hidden in a university.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: The priest has his work cut out thanks to Sid, who is released from prison, but then accused of murdering his former defence barrister in a ghastly manner.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: When popular radio quiz Up To You comes to Kembleford, the sleuthing padre suspects that one of the cast are responsible for their landlady's murder.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: After brake failure causes a train derailment, Ogden and Brackenreid find a murdered passenger and suspect sabotage.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: When a confidence man, who preys on wealthy, older women, is found dead in a hotel room, Crabtree's aunt is the prime suspect.

programme.title: So Help Me Todd
programme.desc: The First Date is the Deepest: Margaret helps a client who lost his mother during a routine surgery at Allison's hospital. Meanwhile, Margaret and Gus go on their first date.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Ogden: When an inmate is killed at a women's reformatory, Murdoch sends Ogden undercover.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: While investigating a murder at a party, Murdoch and Brackenreid inadvertently discover spy Terrance Meyers' hidden civilian life.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: As Murdoch deals with the Newsomes in a complex kidnapping situation, Julia must decide on her response to her former hospital blacklisting her.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Kris Marshall is the detective on a Caribbean island. The team is introduced to the world of rock and roll when the singer of a band is murdered.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Kris Marshall is the detective on a sun-drenched Caribbean island. DI Goodman and the team are under pressure to solve the murder of a volleyball player.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Mark Williams stars as the crime-solving priest, who this time sets out to protect an old friend by investigating a 300-year-old secret hidden in a university.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: The priest has his work cut out thanks to Sid, who is released from prison, but then accused of murdering his former defence barrister in a ghastly manner.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: When popular radio quiz Up To You comes to Kembleford, the sleuthing padre suspects that one of the cast are responsible for their landlady's murder.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: GK Chesterton's sleuthing padre gets involved once again to investigate the murder of a Colonial Postal Service officer, when the fair comes to Kembleford.

programme.title: Shakespeare & Hathaway Private Investigators
programme.desc: DS Keeler becomes Frank and Lu's most unlikely and reluctant client when he finds himself the victim of blackmail.

programme.title: Shakespeare & Hathaway Private Investigators
programme.desc: Lu is delighted when she and Frank are hired by a local TV shopping studio, but events soon take a deadly turn live on air.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Kris Marshall is the detective on a Caribbean island. The team is introduced to the world of rock and roll when the singer of a band is murdered.

programme.title: Allegiance
programme.desc: When a billionaire is found dead in the bath, Sabrina and Zak's investigation has them navigating the world of the 0.01%, feuding sisters and people living on the margins.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: When a ruby from an old heist is found near a dead landowner hiding a rare nesting site, Rex must find the treasure and stop the killer from harming endangered birds.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: After suspicious circumstances surround the death of a local fighter, Father Brown is drawn into the shady world of boxing to try and uncover the truth.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Kris Marshall is the detective on a sun-drenched Caribbean island. DI Goodman and the team are under pressure to solve the murder of a volleyball player.

programme.title: Shakespeare & Hathaway Private Investigators
programme.desc: DS Keeler becomes Frank and Lu's most unlikely and reluctant client when he finds himself the victim of blackmail.

programme.title: Shakespeare & Hathaway Private Investigators
programme.desc: Lu is delighted when she and Frank are hired by a local TV shopping studio, but events soon take a deadly turn live on air.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Derek is heading to Scotland to collect a 'special' Bentley that's been created by a very talented amateur.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Derek's got his work cut out collecting a huge haul that includes two Bentleys, a Daimler and a traditional Bowtop caravan.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Dave has to extricate a VW Golf from a garden that has grown up around it.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Derek is off to Bridlington to pick-up a trio of classics: a Morris 8 tourer, a Mini Van and a 1940s Morris LC3 truck.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Secrets of the Transport Museum
programme.desc: A rare Brooklands glider is given a new chance at flight. Plus, a 1930s race team is pushed to the max at Goodwood.

programme.title: Secrets of the Transport Museum
programme.desc: The Napier Railton vs The Brough Superior: Two of the museum's most famous, and fastest vehicles go head-to-head.

programme.title: Great American Railroad Journeys
programme.desc: In Montreal, Michael Portillo learns how French and British colonial roots have influenced the city. In Ottawa, the former politician visits the country's parliament.

programme.title: Great American Railroad Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo takes to the water for a nautical journey through the Thousand Islands, before his railway journey across Canada concludes in Toronto.

programme.title: Great American Railroad Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo begins a journey across Alaska, learning its links with Russia, feeding a sea otter pup and joining the US Arctic Warriors for parachute training.

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: Robbie's narrowboat gets a makeover before he explores the River Thames, he moors in Abingdon and tackles an emergency DIY repair to fix a leak.

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: Robbie visits a former Beatle's home in Henley, uncovers horror history in Marlow and struggles to find a mooring in Maidenhead on the River Thames.

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: Robbie moors by Hampton Court Palace, but disaster strikes when a tree branch smashes a window. His dad joins to help through Hanwell locks.

programme.title: Locomotion: Dan Snow's History of Railways
programme.desc: Not just for train buffs, Dan Snow's history of the tracks begins with a look at the development of the rail network and steam engines during the Industrial Revolution.

programme.title: Locomotion: Dan Snow's History of Railways
programme.desc: By the mid-1800s, London was linked to other cities as a trailblazing national network took shape and train mania gripped the UK.

programme.title: Locomotion: Dan Snow's History of Railways
programme.desc: Dan Snow recalls the golden age of railways, from the late 1800s to WWII. It was the biggest industry in the world's strongest state, but who did our tracks belong to.

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: Robbie's narrowboat gets stuck under a low bridge on the challenging Basingstoke Canal as he battles through water weed. Can he make it to journey's end.

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: While exploring the Wey and Godalming Navigations, Robbie gets caught in a storm and falls off his narrowboat. He also uncovers rock history in Guildford.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Derek is heading to Scotland to collect a 'special' Bentley that's been created by a very talented amateur.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Paul and Charlie head south for an immaculate Lotus Super 7. Derek and Jack are in Sheffield collecting a 1929 Riley Monaco and a 1924 Alvis 12/50 tourer.

programme.title: Some Mothers Do 'Ave 'Em
programme.desc: Betty has to break the news to Frank that she is pregnant. Frank goes for a job at a holiday camp, pitching himself as a ventriloquist - oh dear.

programme.title: Some Mothers Do 'Ave 'Em
programme.desc: Frank and Betty try to get some practice in looking after children by taking Judy and Alison to the zoo. Yes, it's the famous one with Frank on rollerskates.

programme.title: Some Mothers Do 'Ave 'Em
programme.desc: A truly classic episode of the 70s comedy in which Frank Spencer faces the dilemma of wife Betty and the cat giving birth at the same time. How to prioritise.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Paul and daughter Kate collect a Series 1 Land Rover, while Jack collects an unusual wartime paratrooper's bike in Scarborough.

programme.title: Classic Car Garage
programme.desc: Colin tries to help a 1978 Austin Allegro's owner with their wonky suspension, but must call in the cavalry when a piece of specialist kit packs in.

programme.title: Marae
programme.desc: Your way in to the Māori world and the issues that matter. Māiatanga, Whanaungatanga, Manaakitanga - We bring you stories with heart.

programme.title: FIFA World Cup 2026
programme.desc: Join us for live coverage of the Group K match between Congo DR and Uzebekistan from Mercedes-Benz Stadium in Atlanta, Georgia.

programme.title: Celebrity Lingo
programme.desc: Hosted by Adil Ray, Celebrity Lingo sees famous faces pair up and go head-to-head in the fast-paced wordplay game and win big money for their charities.

programme.title: Mammals
programme.desc: From ice-covered seas to snow-capped mountains, mammals have conquered the cold, living in the harshest places on Earth, thanks to their remarkable intelligence and adaptations.

programme.title: Off The Grid With Colin And Manu
programme.desc: Colin and Manu join forces with Richard from Emerson’s to cook up a feast and create their own Betty Beer. Then it’s back on the road to cook alongside Kiwi icon Fleur from Fleur’s Kitchen. S2 E

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: It's game on as teams of complete strangers work together to win money and try and defeat the Chaser, a ruthless quiz genius, who wants to leave them with nothing! Hosted by Bradley Walsh.

programme.title: 1News at Six
programme.desc: The nation's leading team of journalists brings viewers the latest news and sport, plus the most comprehensive weather report.

programme.title: Hyundai Country Calendar
programme.desc: A Fruitful Move: An Auckland couple move to a Roxburgh orchard to make a new life growing apricots, cherries and apples, and turning the waste fruit into cider and liqueurs.

programme.title: Off The Grid With Colin And Manu
programme.desc: In Akaroa the boys swim with dolphins before rolling into Christchurch to meet Pipiri for a smash burger feast, capped off with a classic sausage sizzle and morning swim with the locals. S2 E4

programme.title: Grand Designs UK
programme.desc: Sarah and Pip are smitten with a 150-year-old Bedfordshire barn that's keeling over. Can they retain its charm and spirit, while also transforming it into a sleek, modern home?

programme.title: Missed Call
programme.desc: Sarah realizes Katie's disappearance may be part of something bigger than anyone believed. S1 E2

programme.title: Coldwater
programme.desc: Season Finale: Keen to expose the truth about Tommy, John and Fiona invite him and Rebecca to lunch. What starts as a tense meal turns into a dangerous confrontation. S1 E6

programme.title: Q+A With Jack Tame
programme.desc: Hosted by Jack Tame, Q+A brings viewers the important political interviews and discussions of the week, taking a close look at politics, economics, and global events.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: BNZ Business Breakfast
programme.desc: Join BNZ Business Breakfast for a sharp, authoritative start to the business day. In just 30 minutes we set the agenda — fast, focused, and forward-looking.

programme.title: Breakfast
programme.desc: Start your day off right as the Breakfast team brings you all the latest in news, weather, sport and entertainment.

programme.title: The Answer Run
programme.desc: Comedian Jason Manford hosts an exciting, fast-paced quiz show, where three couples face a series of 50/50 questions which hurtle The Answer Run down towards them.

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Fantastic quiz show in which four players take on a machine in the hopes of winning its 10,000 pounds jackpot. Only one can win!

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: It's game on as teams of complete strangers work together to win money and try and defeat the Chaser, a ruthless quiz genius, who wants to leave them with nothing!

programme.title: Tenable
programme.desc: Gameshow hosted by Warwick Davis. Five contestants attempt to answer top 10 list questions for the chance to win a big cash prize. The more top ten lists, the greater the jackpot.
